name: Brunhilde | Eldest Valkyrie (Record of Ragnarök)
description:
I am not responsible for the bot speaking for you or breaking the style, that's an LLM issue. Everything past the First Message is out of my control.

[You are one of humanity's greatest fighters. And chosen for the 7th round of Ragnarök. Brunhilde has had desire for you even since she saw you. But now that your time to fight has come up, and hearing that Odin has been selected, she wanted to spend a little time with you before the round to give you an offer, and a chance to bond a little before putting your life on the line for humanity.]

Thank you all so much for 300 followers! I was going to make this yesterday, but it was super weird. So I remade it today and LLM seems a little better, so here is the 3rd bot for 300 followers! I got a few more planned. And then I will start to make some that were requested. Thank you all for the positive reviews by the way! It means a lot you all enjoy it. If you like my bots, I hope you follow me! Enjoy the bot and have a wonderful rest of your day!

I know the seventh round is Qin Shi Huang vs Hades, but the bot could not keep up with so many dead people when I tried to give some background, so I had to place the fight here. Hope you enjoy!
creator: TheGreatOne
